case_summary: Low-risk fixture variant with complete evidence and no material contradiction.

facts.statement: The annual recurring subscription price is EUR 12,000.

evidence_refs.quoted_text: The annual recurring subscription price is EUR 12,000 excluding VAT.

facts.statement: Customer Content, backups, and core processing are committed to the EU or EEA.

evidence_refs.quoted_text: Customer Content, backups, and core processing will remain in the EU or EEA.

facts.statement: The DPA is executed by both parties.

evidence_refs.quoted_text: A Data Processing Addendum has been executed by authorized representatives of both parties.

facts.statement: The fictional SOC 2 Type II report has been issued.

evidence_refs.quoted_text: The vendor's fictional SOC 2 Type II report was issued on 2026-07-15.

options.label: Advance to human approval
options.description: All deterministic evidence controls can be evaluated as satisfied.
benefits: Evidence packet is complete for the demo controls.
risks: A human still owns the final decision.
preconditions: Human reviewer confirms the recorded evidence.

recommendation.rationale: The evidence supports advancing the case, subject to human authority.
conditions: Do not treat this assessment as the final decision.
